reply.text: My therapist is going to call this picture the root of my problems

messages.text: i tried, but you’re on the grass doing yoga on hard mode
grass boring, your chaos looks better
it is, but you posted my villain origin in sun glow
ur dramatic for a mat and some water
random but how many pillows you sleep with
plot twist, that story was bait
just seeing how many i need when my back copies that stretch
i can learn, just need a mean coach who bullies me a little
